title: ZUI Theme Contract
description: Defines what a consumer theme MUST provide to use the zui design system.

mode.description: Whether this is a light or dark theme. Controls which shade maps to which semantic token.

colors.description: Color seeds for each intent. Each seed is { hue, chroma, anchorLightness }. Only primary and neutral are required.

surfaces.description: Optional surface colors for canvas layering. Independent of the neutral palette. Each is an oklch() string. Omitted values cascade: raised derives from base, overlay matches raised.

base.description: App background (e.g. 'oklch(0.985 0 0)'). Default: oklch(0.985 0 0) light / oklch(0.13 0 0) dark.

raised.description: Cards, sidebar, toolbar (e.g. 'oklch(1 0 0)'). Default: derived from base.

overlay.description: Dialogs, drawers, popovers (e.g. 'oklch(1 0 0)'). Default: same as raised.

ink.description: Optional ink colors for text on surfaces. Independent of the neutral palette. Default body text (--foreground, --card-foreground, --popover-foreground) aliases ink, not neutral. The system auto-selects dark or light ink for text on color intent shades.

dark.description: Dark ink for text on light surfaces (e.g. 'oklch(0.145 0 0)'). Default: oklch(0.145 0 0).

light.description: Light ink for text on dark surfaces (e.g. 'oklch(0.985 0 0)'). Default: oklch(0.985 0 0).

chrome.description: Optional UI chrome: borders, inputs, and focus ring. Independent of the neutral palette. Each value is an oklch() string. Omitted border/input use defaults derived from surfaces; omitted ring uses the primary palette 300 stop.

border.description: Default hairlines and separators (--border). Default: derived from surface base/raised.

input.description: Input borders (--input). Default: same as border when omitted.

ring.description: Focus ring color (--ring). Default: primary palette 300 stop (lighter brand tint).

lightnessCurve.description: Optional override for the default lightness curve. Keys are shade names (50-950), values are OKLCH lightness (0-1).

chroma.description: OKLCH chroma (0 = gray, ~0.15 = vivid, ~0.3 = extremely saturated)

anchorLightness.description: OKLCH lightness (0-1) for the anchor shade; the default curve is shifted so this shade matches.
